TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Corey_Brewer, title = Corey_Brewer, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Corey_Brewer} }

S.FORM: Corey Brewer hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw / praw maki' tayglaing. kawas te 1986, byacing te 3 ru 5 ryax qu hintgan nya (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1999), kinhulan nya ga Tennessee, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 206 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 74 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 2007 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Minnesota Timberwolves. raral ga,Corey Brewer mqwas beh Portland pqwasan biru.hiya mzyu mari maki Portland. Brewer magal pira mqwas beh Florida krahu' pqwasan biru. 2004-2007 kawas Brewer mzyu mari maki hlahuy na . 2020 kawas 11 byacing 16 ryax,Corey Brewer wal nhngaw la. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Corey Brewer hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'agal tins' tay suruw / praw maki' tayglaing. kawas te 1986, byacing te 3 ru 5 ryax qu hintgan nya (mhuqil sa kawas tay 1999), kinhulan nya ga Tennessee, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 206 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 74 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 2007 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Minnesota Timberwolves. raral ga,Corey Brewer mqwas beh Portland pqwasan biru.hiya mzyu mari maki Portland. Brewer magal pira mqwas beh Florida krahu' pqwasan biru. 2004-2007 kawas Brewer mzyu mari maki hlahuy na . 2020 kawas 11 byacing 16 ryax,Corey Brewer wal nhngaw la. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨorej βrewer ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pʔaɣal tins~ɕʔ taj s~ɕuruw / praw makiʔ tajɣlaiŋ. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru * rjax qu ħintɣan nja (mħuqil s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****), kinħulan nja ɣa tennes~ɕs~ɕee, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu minnes~ɕota timβerwol*es~ɕ. raral ɣa,ʦ~ʨorej βrewer mqwas~ɕ βeħ portlan* pqwas~ɕan βiru.ħija mzju mari maki portlan*. βrewer maɣal pira mqwas~ɕ βeħ *lori*a kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru. ****-**** kawas~ɕ βrewer mzju mari maki ħlaħuj na . **** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax,ʦ~ʨorej βrewer wal nħŋaw la. kinβlajqan pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan s~ɕa qnxan nijaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
